title: Neighborhood Events
blurb: South Boise Village hosts events throughout the year that bring neighbors together—community cleanups, park gatherings, meetings, and seasonal celebrations. Everyone is welcome to attend.

events.title: Compost Giveaway
events.description: Free compost available for neighbors — bring your own bags or containers.

events.title: May Board Meeting
events.description: Special topics: ACHD's South Boise Transportation Plan and BSU's 10-Year Campus Master Plan. Neighbors are encouraged to attend and participate.

events.title: August Board Meeting
events.description: Quarterly neighborhood association board meeting. Neighbors are encouraged to attend and participate.

events.title: Ice Cream Social
events.description: Come enjoy ice cream and get to know your neighbors! All ages welcome.

events.title: Annual Meeting
events.description: SBVNA annual meeting. Review the year's activities and plan ahead. All residents welcome.
